positive: A mesmerizing, stylized illustration of a cosmic river flowing through ancient, geometric ruins. The main subject is a bioluminescent nebula swirling with deep purples, electric blues, and neon teal, contrasting against stylized black basalt columns and intricate golden filigree architecture. The composition is highly centered, symmetrical, and dynamic. Use a strong, dramatic silhouette aesthetic with high contrast and defined borders. Minimalist sci-fi vaporwave fusion style, inspired by Art Deco and cosmic geometry. Flat vector art texture applied to organic shapes. Bright overhead spotlighting emphasizing sharp edges and glows. Print-ready design, isolated on a neutral background.
negative: blur, grainy, noise, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, copyright, messy, dirty, smudge, artifacts, multiple subjects, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, photorealism, grayscale
